name: agent-review-pipeline
description: Autonomous code review pipeline with asymmetric dual-engine dispatch. Codex runs ARP's correctness + adversarial framings (2 dispatches); Gemini runs its own /ce:review compound-engineering pipeline (1 dispatch). Confidence-weighted consensus, bounded auto-fix loop, loop-thrash kill switch, safe-off defaults.

maxIterations.title: Max Iterations
maxIterations.description: Max auto-fix retry loops before escalating. Range: 1-10. Unlimited is intentionally not supported (cost safety).

failOnError.title: Fail On Error
failOnError.description: If true, abort pipeline when a stage can't PASS within maxIterations instead of escalating.

defaultEngine.title: Default Engine
defaultEngine.description: Engine selection when none specified on CLI. Values: both, gemini, codex.

geminiModel.title: Gemini Model (informational — pinned in v5.3.0)
geminiModel.description: v5.3.0 pin: model is hardcoded to gemini-3-flash-preview in the dispatch wrapper regardless of this userConfig. Changing this value has no effect. Rationale: v5.2 cascade (Flash → Flash-Lite → operator-override Pro) shipped with two flaws — (a) Flash-Lite fallback doc admits '[] empty findings under load' (degraded quality), (b) Pro tier 429'd 28× in 2 min on v5.2 release day (unreliable). v5.3 ships Flash-only with API key Tier 1 auth + parallel persona spawn. Re-adding Pro requires a fork of this plugin.

autoCommit.title: Auto Commit Fixes
autoCommit.description: If true, autonomously commit fixes at the end of the pipeline. Default false for safety — user should review before committing.

postPrComment.title: Post PR Comment
postPrComment.description: If true, auto-post executive summary to the GitHub PR via 'gh pr comment'. Default false — review output locally first before making public.

dryRun.title: Dry Run
dryRun.description: If true, run review stages and print findings + proposed fixes without applying any Edit, commit, or PR comment.

qualityGateEnabled.title: Quality Gate Enabled
qualityGateEnabled.description: Master toggle. When false, all three phases skipped (backward compat).

qualityGateSemanticDedup.title: Semantic Dedup
qualityGateSemanticDedup.description: Phase A: group similar findings across engines via Haiku Agent.

qualityGateClassifier.title: Finding Classifier
qualityGateClassifier.description: Phase B: filter false positives, re-rank severity. Drops below classifierMinScore.

qualityGateClassifierMinScore.title: Classifier Min Score
qualityGateClassifierMinScore.description: Min real_score (1-5) to keep. Higher = stricter. Default 3.

qualityGateEnhancedRules.title: Enhanced Rules Extraction
qualityGateEnhancedRules.description: Phase C: categorize repo rules as SUPPRESS/ENFORCE/IGNORE via Haiku Agent.

qualityGateRulesModel.title: Rules Extraction Model
qualityGateRulesModel.description: Model for Quality Gate Agent calls. Only 'haiku' supported.
